description: Daily backtest ROI tracking. Each entry records the best recommendation_roi achieved on that date.

history.notes: EXECUTION FAILURE: Python実行が自動スケジュールタスク環境でブロックされました。raw data同期もbacktestも実行できませんでした。最新rawデータは2026-03-26まで。2026-03-28のデータは未取得。次回実行時にPermission設定を確認の上、手動でpython許可を追加してください。

NO IMPROVEMENT (2 runs). baseline_daily: 0 bets (null ROI) because no race on 2026-03-30 had required_first_lane=1 candidate. Run 1 (trials 01-05): --clear-derived-filters variants all gave 30d ROI -0.46 to -0.30, far below baseline 5.9. Run 2 (trials 06-10): structural relaxation — trials 06-07 (min_top_win 0.58/0.55, keep 1-4-6 lanes) got 8 bets 30d ROI 5.0375 (worse); trials 08-10 (remove 2nd/3rd lane constraints, min_top_win 0.60-0.70) yielded identical 7 bets 30d ROI 5.9 as baseline (no change). monthly-roi strategy unchanged.

NO IMPROVEMENT. baseline_daily: 1 bet, ROI=0.8 (hit). baseline_30d: 7 bets, ROI=-0.742857 (1 hit, return=180 on 700 invested). Trials 01-05 all produced identical results to baseline. Trial 01 (min_top_win=0.60) and Trial 02 (min_top_win=0.55): relaxation had no effect because existing 7 races already pass the original 0.63 threshold. Trial 03 (remove third lane): intended to pass --required-first-lane 1 --required-second-lane 4 without third lane, but CLI behavior keeps preset required_third_lane=6 unless --required-third-lane 0 is explicitly passed. Trial 04 (max_market_odds=50): all 7 bets had odds <= 50 already. Trial 05 (min_probability=0.05): all 7 bets had probability >= 0.05 already. Strategy unchanged. Note: 30d window (2026-03-03 to 2026-04-01) was a losing period for the 1-4-6 lane strategy. To try removing third-lane constraint in future, use --required-third-lane 0.
